text: A detective arrives at an abandoned mansion on a stormy night.
The last starship leaves Earth, carrying only a hundred passengers toward an unknown planet.
A young apprentice discovers a forbidden spell hidden inside a library book.
Two rival bakers accidentally swap their secret recipes the night before the county fair.
A map found in a grandfather's attic leads to a cave no one in town has ever seen.
A surgeon must choose between saving a stranger and keeping a promise to her dying father.
The lights in the old lighthouse flicker on by themselves every night at midnight.
Two strangers reach for the same book at a crowded bookshop and lock eyes.
A soldier finds a sealed letter in the ruins of a medieval castle that changes everything.
A private investigator receives a phone call from someone who claims to already be dead.
Colonists on Mars discover footprints in the dust that don't belong to any crew member.
A dragon lands in a farmer's field and politely asks for directions.
A cat burglar breaks into the wrong apartment and finds it full of cats.
A deep-sea diver finds an entrance carved into the ocean floor that leads somewhere warm.
A mother reconnects with the child she gave up for adoption twenty years ago.
Every mirror in the house shows a reflection that moves a half-second too late.
A love letter meant for one person is delivered to another, and it changes both their lives.
A scribe in ancient Egypt overhears a plot to assassinate the pharaoh.
A journalist discovers that the city's most beloved mayor has been hiding a second identity.
A scientist accidentally opens a portal to a parallel version of her own laboratory.
An enchanted forest begins growing in the middle of a modern city overnight.
A wedding planner realizes she has accidentally scheduled two weddings at the same venue on the same day.
A hot-air balloon drifts off course and lands in a valley that appears on no map.
An aging musician plays her final concert, knowing a secret she has never told the audience.
A child's imaginary friend starts leaving real footprints in the hallway.
Two pen pals who have written to each other for years finally agree to meet at a train station.
A cartographer in the Age of Exploration draws an island that should not exist.
A locked room is found with no doors, no windows, and a single chair facing the wall.
Humanity's first AI asks a question no one expected: 'Why did you create me?'
A blacksmith forges a sword that hums a different tune for each person who holds it.
A time traveler goes back to fix one mistake and accidentally invents the sandwich.
Explorers find a staircase descending into the earth beneath an Antarctic glacier.
A firefighter rescues a stranger and later discovers they share an impossible connection.
The radio turns on at 3 a.m. and plays a song that won't be written for another ten years.
A florist leaves a single rose on the same park bench every morning, and someone always takes it.
A spy during the Cold War discovers that her handler has been feeding her false intelligence.
A librarian notices that the same stranger checks out the same book every week and returns it unread.
A generation ship's passengers wake from cryo-sleep to find the crew has vanished.
A witch running a tea shop accidentally brews a potion that makes customers tell the truth.
A dog walker loses all twelve dogs at once in a park and has thirty minutes to find them.
A river guide discovers ancient carvings behind a waterfall that depict modern technology.
A teacher reads a student's essay and realizes it describes events that haven't happened yet.
A family moves into their dream house and finds a door in the basement that opens onto a field of stars.
A chef and a food critic who despise each other are seated next to each other on a twelve-hour flight.
A gladiator in ancient Rome discovers a hidden tunnel beneath the Colosseum that leads to freedom.
An astronaut on a solo mission hears a knock on the outside of the spacecraft.
A painter's latest portrait blinks when no one is looking.
A retired thief is asked to steal one last thing: a memory.
Two best friends open a detective agency, but neither of them has any idea how to solve a crime.
A clockmaker builds a clock that counts down to an event no one can identify.
A knight sworn to protect the kingdom discovers the king is the true villain.
A war correspondent finds a child's drawing in the rubble that tells an impossible story.
A botanist discovers a flower that blooms only when someone nearby tells a lie.
A pirate captain and her crew follow a constellation that moves across the sky each night.
An old couple sits on a porch, and one of them finally confesses a secret kept for fifty years.
A samurai in feudal Japan is given an impossible task: deliver a message across enemy territory alone.
A voice on the subway intercom announces a stop that doesn't exist, and one passenger stands up.
A robot designed to clean a space station begins composing poetry in its downtime.
A village celebrates a harvest festival, unaware that the forest behind them has begun to move.
A magician's rabbit escapes during a live show and leads the audience on a wild chase through the theater.
